details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level subdirectory under reports/.
reports/board/ is missing. Governance contract requires reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to both exist. reports/audit/ is present. Board reports found at board/eod/ (non-standard location).

Deprecated moltbot/ directory exists at repo root with active Python modules: orchestrator.py, promotion_discipline.py, board.py, sentinel.py, memory_evolution.py. Per governance policy, Moltbot code should have been removed.

Clawdbot/Moltbot references found in code/config (not in excluded audit/docs paths): moltbot/ directory (5 Python files), scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py
